mapper.select: select word_id, word, replace_text, status, update_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from sensitive_words where word_id = #{wordId} and deleted = false

select count(1) from sensitive_words
and deleted = false
and word like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
and status = #{status}
mapper.update: update sensitive_words set word = #{word}, replace_text = #{replaceText}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where word_id = #{wordId} and deleted = false
